L1_headline: + PEN – Bridget O'Rourke acquired 589 RSU shares. | 02/13/2026
L2_brief: Director Bridget O'Rourke acquired 589 shares of Penumbra Inc common stock on 02/13/2026 via a restricted stock unit award at $0 per share. The RSUs vest quarterly through 12/31/2026, but will fully accelerate upon the closing of the pending merger with Boston Scientific Corporation, subject to continued service as director. Post-transaction holdings are 5,962 shares (direct), a portion of which remain subject to vesting.

L3_detailed.deal_signal: The filing references a pending Agreement and Plan of Merger dated January 14, 2026, among Penumbra Inc, Boston Scientific Corporation, and Pinehurst Merger Sub, Inc. The RSU grant includes a provision for full acceleration of unvested RSUs upon the closing of the merger, contingent on continued service as director through the closing date. No discretionary purchase or sale was made.
L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a routine RSU grant to a director with standard quarterly vesting. The grant includes merger-related acceleration provisions consistent with the pending Boston Scientific acquisition. No open-market buying or selling activity is present.
risks_flagged: No 10b5-1 plan noted; transaction is an RSU award, not an open-market trade
A portion of total holdings (5,962 shares) remains subject to vesting conditions
